name: HTTP API Source
shortDescription: Run a Flask web gateway and use it to publish to a Kafka topic via HTTP POST requests.

Variables.Name: output
Variables.Description: This is the output topic for hello world data

Variables.Name: basic_auth_username
Variables.Description: Username for basic authentication. If set along with basic_auth_password, all POST endpoints will require basic auth.

Variables.Name: basic_auth_password
Variables.Description: Password for basic authentication. If set along with basic_auth_username, all POST endpoints will require basic auth.

Variables.Name: api_key
Variables.Description: API key for header-based authentication. If set, requests can authenticate by sending 'X-API-Key: <key>'. Can be used alongside or instead of basic auth.
